examples: His quixotic plan to build a new city was met with ridicule.
She had a quixotic desire to live in a world without war.
While the idea is commendable, I believe it to be quixotic.

hin.definition: The purpose or goal for which something is intended
examples: मेरा उद्देश्य यह सुनिश्चित करना है कि सभी बच्चे स्कूल जा सकें.
विज्ञान का मुख्य उद्देश्य सत्य की खोज है.
उसके प्रस्ताव का उद्देश्य क्या है?
